name: sales-prospecting
description: Build targeted B2B prospect lists with verified contact information, fully MPP-routed via the SELAT Router. Searches companies (Fiber), finds decision-makers (Fiber), pulls all domain emails (Hunter), finds a specific contact's email (Hunter email finder), verifies deliverability (Hunter email verifier), and enriches with company data (Abstract Company Enrichment).

companyQuery.default: B2B SaaS startups in San Francisco with 50-200 employees Series A or B funded
companyQuery.description: Free-form natural-language description of the target companies (ICP) for the Fiber company search.

jobTitles.description: Comma-separated decision-maker job titles for the Fiber people search.

companyNames.description: Comma-separated company names to scope the Fiber people search.

locations.description: Comma-separated locations to scope the Fiber people search.

domain.description: Company domain used for Hunter domain-search, the Hunter email-finder lookup, and the Abstract Company Enrichment lookup.

firstName.description: First name of the specific contact whose email the Hunter email finder should find.

lastName.description: Last name of the specific contact whose email the Hunter email finder should find.

email.description: Email address to verify for deliverability via the Hunter email verifier before adding to a sequence.

steps.label: all emails for domain — Hunter domain search (ROUTED MPP via SELAT Router)
find specific contact email — Hunter email finder (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
verify email deliverability — Hunter email verifier (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
enrich with company data — Abstract Company Enrichment lookup (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
